case_title: GRIFFIN, SUSAN, RECEIVER vs. PINOWAR, ZBIGNIEW et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF GRIFFIN, SUSAN, RECEIVER AS TO DEFENDANT PINOWAR, ZBIGNIEW ROBERT, LEONARD MR. SKONY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GRIFFIN, SUSAN, RECEIVER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PINOWAR, ZBIGNIEW ROBERT, LEONARD MR. SKONY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 615 LEAVENWORTH ST #403, LEASE FORFEITED
